resposta:
solution:
```
class Solution:
    def greatestLetter(self, s: str) -> str:
        lower = set(c for c in s if c.islower())
        upper = set(c.upper() for c in s if c.isupper())
        common = lower & upper
        return max(common) if common else ""
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses sets to efficiently store and intersect the lowercase and uppercase letters in the input string, and then returns the maximum common letter if it exists.
